title: 使用 Perplexity 网络搜索与 Vercel AI Gateway - Vercel
author: Dan Fein, Jerilyn Zheng
content:
Models are powerful, but they're limited to their training data and knowledge cutoff date. When users ask about today's news, current prices, or the latest API changes, models can offer outdated information or admit they don't know.

Provider-agnostic web search on AI Gateway changes this. With a single line of code, you can give any model the ability to search the web in real-time. It works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and every other provider available through AI Gateway.

Link to heading How it works

To use provider-agnostic search with the AI SDK, import gateway.tools.perplexitySearch() from @ai-sdk/gateway and pass it in the tools parameter as perplexity_search to any model. When the model determines it needs current information, it automatically searches the web and incorporates the results into its response.

import { streamText } from 'ai';
import { gateway } from '@ai-sdk/gateway';


const result = streamText({
  model: 'minimax/minimax-m2.1',
  prompt: 'What were the major tech announcements this week?',
  tools: {
    perplexity_search: gateway.tools.perplexitySearch(),
  },
});

Link to heading Use cases

Link to heading Models without native search

Many capable models don't include built-in web search. Perplexity search adds this capability to any model available through AI Gateway.

import { streamText } from 'ai';
import { gateway } from '@ai-sdk/gateway';


const result = streamText({
  model: 'zai/glm-4.7', // No native search, but Perplexity works
  prompt: 'What new features were added in React 19.2?',
  tools: {
    perplexity_search: gateway.tools.perplexitySearch(),
  },
});

Link to heading Developer tooling and CI assistants

Code assistants are more useful when they know about current package versions, recently merged PRs, release notes, and documentation updates. Stale information leads to broken builds and security issues.

import { streamText } from 'ai';
import { gateway } from '@ai-sdk/gateway';


const result = streamText({
  model: 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5',
  prompt: 'What is the latest stable version of Next.js and what breaking changes should I know about?',
  tools: {
    perplexity_search: gateway.tools.perplexitySearch(),
  },
});

Link to heading Provider-agnostic chatbot

Production chatbots often need to work across multiple models for cost optimization, failover, or A/B testing. Native search tools differ between providers, but Perplexity search works identically regardless of which model you use.

import { streamText } from 'ai';
import { gateway } from '@ai-sdk/gateway';


const models = ['openai/gpt-5.2', 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5', 'zai/glm-4.7'];


const result = streamText({
  model: models[selectedIndex], // Same search logic works across any model
  prompt: 'What is the current status of the OpenAI API?',
  tools: {
    perplexity_search: gateway.tools.perplexitySearch({
      searchDomainFilter: ['status.openai.com', 'openai.com'],
      searchRecencyFilter: 'day',
    }),
  },
});

Link to heading Operational and market-aware agents

Agents that monitor pricing changes, service outages, job postings, or social announcements need near real-time information to be useful. Web search keeps them current without manual data pipelines.

import { streamText } from 'ai';
import { gateway } from '@ai-sdk/gateway';


const result = streamText({
  model: 'openai/gpt-5.2',
  prompt: 'Are there any ongoing incidents affecting Vercel or AWS us-east-1?',
  tools: {
    perplexity_search: gateway.tools.perplexitySearch({
      searchDomainFilter: ['status.vercel.com', 'health.aws.amazon.com'],
      searchRecencyFilter: 'day',
    }),
  },
});

Link to heading Provider-specific tools

AI Gateway also supports native web search from Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google. These provider-specific tools are optimized for their respective models and may offer additional features.

Use Perplexity when you want consistent search behavior across different models, or when your model's provider doesn't offer native web search.

See the web search docs for details on all available options.

Link to heading Pricing

Perplexity web search requests are charged at $5 per 1,000 requests in AI Gateway. There is no markup on these requests. See Perplexity's pricing for more details.

Link to heading Get started

Add real-time web search to your AI application today:

  • Web search documentation

  • AI Gateway
aiSummary: Vercel AI Gateway 现已集成 Perplexity 网络搜索功能，允许任何 LLM 执行实时、提供商无关的网络搜索以获取最新信息。
oneSentenceSummary: Vercel AI Gateway 现已集成 Perplexity 网络搜索功能，允许任何 LLM 执行实时、提供商无关的网络搜索以获取最新信息。
summary: 这篇 Vercel 博客文章宣布将 Perplexity 网络搜索集成到 Vercel AI Gateway 中，使任何大语言模型（LLM）都能通过一行代码执行实时网络搜索。它解决了 LLM 受限于其训练数据和知识截止日期的局限性。文章解释了来自 `@ai-sdk/gateway` 的 `gateway.tools.perplexitySearch()` 如何让模型自动搜索网络并将结果整合到其响应中。关键用例包括为没有原生搜索功能的模型添加搜索能力，通过最新信息增强开发者工具，促进跨多个 LLM 的提供商无关聊天机器人，以及为运营/市场感知智能体提供实时数据支持。文章区分了 Perplexity 搜索与提供商特定工具的不同，强调了其在模型间的一致性，并详细说明了定价结构。

mainPoints.point: Vercel AI Gateway 通过 Perplexity 引入提供商无关的网络搜索
mainPoints.explanation: 此功能允许开发者轻松将实时网络搜索能力集成到 AI Gateway 支持的任何 LLM 中，克服模型的知识截止限制。

mainPoints.point: 使用 `@ai-sdk/gateway` 通过一行代码实现简单集成
mainPoints.explanation: `gateway.tools.perplexitySearch()` 函数可以通过 tools 参数传递给任何模型，在需要当前信息时启用自动网络搜索。

mainPoints.point: 为 LLM 启用新用例，包括没有原生搜索功能的模型
mainPoints.explanation: 这使得缺乏内置搜索功能的模型能够访问最新信息，通过提供当前包版本和文档来增强开发者工具，并支持多模型聊天机器人和实时运营智能体的一致搜索行为。

mainPoints.point: 提供跨不同 LLM 提供商的一致性
mainPoints.explanation: 与提供商特定的搜索工具不同，通过 AI Gateway 的 Perplexity 搜索在各种模型（OpenAI、Anthropic、Google 等）上统一工作，简化了多模型应用的开发。

keyQuotes: 模型很强大，但它们受限于其训练数据和知识截止日期。
通过一行代码，您可以让任何模型具备实时搜索网络的能力。
当模型确定需要当前信息时，它会自动搜索网络并将结果整合到其响应中。
Perplexity 网络搜索将此功能添加到通过 AI Gateway 可用的任何模型中。
当您希望在不同模型间保持一致的搜索行为，或者您的模型提供商不提供原生网络搜索时，请使用 Perplexity。
